# Introduction

Write your introduction here. Use standard Markdown and Quarto syntax.
You can include equations with LaTeX:

$$
\frac{\partial V_m}{\partial t} = \nabla \cdot (\mathbf{D} \nabla V_m) - \frac{I_{ion}}{C_m}
$$ {#eq-monodomain}

The monodomain equation (@eq-monodomain) governs the propagation of the
transmembrane potential $V_m$ through cardiac tissue, where $\mathbf{D}$ is the
diffusion tensor and $I_{ion}$ represents the ionic current density.
